text: The monthly rent shall be INR 18,000 payable on or before the 5th of each month.
A security deposit equivalent to two months of rent is due at signing and will be refunded at move-out subject to deductions.
The lock-in period is 6 months during which neither party may terminate without mutual consent.
Either party may terminate this agreement by providing 30 days written notice.
The tenant is responsible for routine maintenance and minor repairs below INR 1,000.
The landlord must provide a 24-hour notice before entering the premises for inspection.
Utilities such as electricity and water will be paid by the tenant directly to the providers.
Late payment of rent will incur a penalty of INR 100 per day until cleared.
If the tenant vacates early, the security deposit may be adjusted against unpaid rent or damages.
This agreement is governed by the laws of India and any disputes shall be subject to Bengaluru jurisdiction.
